productDisplayName: Puma Women Chill Grip Black Handbag
description: A quirky, spacious day/overnight bag – big enough for all your essentials, this bag from puma is inspired by the ultra-cool puffer jacket style. The unique pouch on the front will have heads turning for a closer look, while the front pouch is easy to open with one press button fastening the top corner which folds, back allowing you to reach inside easily. Made of slick shiny polyester fabric and padded and stitched to create a quilted effect, the style factor of this bag is enhanced by the high-shine of imitation leather handles, piping and a hard plastic puma cat to decorate – all in black. Ultimately this is a one-of-a-kind bag which stands out from the normal choices without loosing one bit of practicality. Height: 28cm Width: 40cm Depth: 14cm Black polyester quilted bag with two synthetic leather handles long enough to Fit over the shoulder One large main compartment with large internal zip pocket, mobile pocket and one open pocket, plus stiff base to keep the bag in shape Elegant big loops in imitation leather as zipper pulls Front pouch fastened by a popper in one corner Hard plastic Puma cat emblem in black on bottom corner of front Care Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent
